column8: The webpage provides the Chinese Students and Scholars Association at the University of Pittsburgh's announcement of the 2026 Spring Festival Gala, held at Bellefield Hall on February 14, 2026. The announcement invites the Chinese community to the festival's celebration and includes a Google Map to the event location and an event poster in Chinese for advertising. The event poster includes the event name, festival celebration wishes, event time and location, and a QR code linking to the Chinese Students and Scholars Association's WeChat account homepage.
column13: Chinese Students and Scholars Association University of Pittsburgh
